results.name: COMEN01
results.content:
COMEN01 DFHMSD CTRL=(ALARM,FREEKB),                                    -
               EXTATT=YES,                                             -
               LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: COPAU0A
results.content:
COPAU0A DFHMDI COLUMN=1,                                               -        
               LINE=1,                                                 -        
               SIZE=(24,80)                                                     
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=5,                                               -        
               POS=(1,1),                                              -        
               INITIAL='Tran:'                                                  
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=4,                                               -        
               POS=(1,7)                                                        
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -        
               LENGTH=40,                                              -        
               POS=(1,21)                                                       
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=5,                                               -        
               POS=(1,65),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Date:'                                                  
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=8,                                               -        
               POS=(1,71),                                             -        
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'                                               
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=5,                                               -        
               POS=(2,1),                                              -        
               INITIAL='Prog:'                                                  
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=8,                                               -        
               POS=(2,7)                                                        
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -        
               LENGTH=40,                                              -        
               POS=(2,21)                                                       
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=5,                                               -        
               POS=(2,65),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Time:'                                                  
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=8,                                               -        
               POS=(2,71),                                             -        
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'                                               
        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(3,30),                                             -
               INITIAL='View Authorizations'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -        
               LENGTH=15,                                              -        
               POS=(5,3),                                              -
               INITIAL='Search Acct Id:'                                        
ACCTID  DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -        
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -        
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -        
               LENGTH=11,                                              -        
               POS=(5,19)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               LENGTH=0,                                               -        
               POS=(5,31)
        DFHMDF COLOR=DEFAULT,                                          -        
               LENGTH=6,                                               -        
               POS=(6,3),                                              -        
               INITIAL='Name: '                                                 
CNAME   DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=25,                                              -        
               POS=(6,10)                                                       
        DFHMDF LENGTH=13,                                              -        
               POS=(6,44),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Customer Id: '                                          
CUSTID  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=9,                                               -        
               POS=(6,58)                                                       
ADDR001 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=25,                                              -        
               POS=(7,10)                                                       
        DFHMDF LENGTH=13,                                              -        
               POS=(7,44),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Acct Status: '                                          
ACCSTAT DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=1,                                               -        
               POS=(7,58)                                                       
ADDR002 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=25,                                              -        
               POS=(8,10)                                                       
        DFHMDF LENGTH=3,                                               -        
               POS=(9,10),                                             -        
               INITIAL='PH:'                                                    
PHONE1  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=13,                                              -        
               POS=(9,15)                                                       
        DFHMDF LENGTH=13,                                              -        
               POS=(9,44),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Approval # : '                                          
APPRCNT DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=3,                                               -        
               POS=(9,58)                                                       
        DFHMDF LENGTH=10,                                              -        
               POS=(9,64),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Decline #:'                                             
DECLCNT DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=3,                                               -        
               POS=(9,76)                                                       
        DFHMDF COLOR=DEFAULT,                                          -        
               LENGTH=11,                                              -        
               POS=(11,6),                                             -        
               INITIAL='Credit Lim:'                                            
CREDLIM DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -        
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -        
               LENGTH=12,                                              -        
               POS=(11,19),                                            -        
               INITIAL=' '
